testcase.name: test_cors_wildcard_and_no_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'true' != 'true' + where 'true' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x792217b088f0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x792217b088f0> = 'true'.lower + where 'true' = get('access-control-allow-credentials', 'false') + where get = {'Date': 'Sat, 02 May 2026 17:25:12 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': '9f58b94e6a7fe578-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-credentials': 'true', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=nPUxXw1wvm12IBFv4RGOLGIhq9n0nKfXvAmpz7FqI3k-1777742712.0611477-1.0.1.1-O7O7AXeyCd0ooZmepPK4migYby5Jw2m1D4ulQIgWhPIOBeHVCawA3xHUahmu.A5hjCX2AY9zkmjXL5T45OHQWIAX8I0k.k.CH3bl_yKB.T9Hze4af52KRhU.B49O2RiU; testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cms.py:231: in test_cors_wildcard_and_no_credentials assert r.headers.get("access-control-allow-credentials", "false").lower() != "true" E AssertionError: assert 'true' != 'true' E + where 'true' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0x792217b088f0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0x792217b088f0> = 'true'.lower E + where 'true' = get('access-control-allow-credentials', 'false') E + where get = {'Date': 'Sat, 02 May 2026 17:25:12 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': '9f58b94e6a7fe578-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'access-control-allow-credentials': 'true', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=nPUxXw1wvm12IBFv4RGOLGIhq9n0nKfXvAmpz7FqI3k-1777742712.0611477-1.0.1.1-O7O7AXeyCd0ooZmepPK4migYby5Jw2m1D4ulQIgWhPIOBeHVCawA3xHUahmu.A5hjCX2AY9zkmjXL5T45OHQWIAX8I0k.k.CH3bl_yKB.T9Hze4af52KRhU.B49O2RiU;
